data.description:
Repro (verified): import rebar; rebar.__version__ == "0.3.0" while importlib.metadata.version("nava-rebar") == "0.4.0". Source: src/rebar/__init__.py:22 hardcodes 0.3.0; pyproject.toml:10 is 0.4.0 (the Release 0.4.0 commit 2a06570 did not bump the attr).

Fix: derive __version__ from importlib.metadata.version("nava-rebar") with a dev fallback, and/or add a release-check test asserting module attr == package metadata so this cannot recur. RED test first per TDD.
data.title: rebar.__version__ says 0.3.0; installed package is 0.4.0
